candidates.why: Most direct top-line revenue line for recent years; preferable to broader totals when available.

Specific gain item, not total revenue.

candidates.row_label: Net Investments & Loans Gain/Loss - Business Revenue

variables.notes: Use as priority list across years: Insurance revenue for 2022-2025, then Total Revenue for years where the specific insurance revenue label is unavailable.

Candidate list is empty. For an insurer, the closest analogue to direct cost of sales is 'Insurance service expenses', which appears as the main direct insurance cost line above profit measures. Marked manual review because insurer statements do not map cleanly to traditional COGS.

candidates.why: Clear overhead component and valid SG&A-type expense.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

candidates.row_label: Net finance income or expenses and operating expenses from investment contracts
candidates.why: Mixed finance and operating line; includes finance items so not appropriate SG&A.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A line exists. 'Staff costs' is a clear overhead component for 2021. 'Other expenses' appears to be the closest recurring overhead bucket for 2022-2025. Chose outside the candidate list because the provided candidates miss the best recurring overhead label and one candidate is not an expense while another mixes finance items. Excluded 'Other Operating Expense' because its detailed 2021 components include 'Depreciation & Amortization', which XSGA must exclude. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other expenses

candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, too narrow and supplemental.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

Includes non-controlling interests; only fallback if owner equity unavailable.

Balancing item, not a true equity measure.

Entire balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
